description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a warm, medium-brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three individual back cushions and three seat cushions, with an extended chaise lounge on the left side for added comfort. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the overall sleek and contemporary design. The legs are slim, cylindrical, and dark-colored, slightly elevating the sofa off the ground and providing a minimalist touch. The backrest is straight and uniform in height, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and streamlined appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with subtle seams outlining the cushion edges.
description: A modern L-shaped brown leather sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, straight padded armrests, and slim dark legs. The design is sleek, with smooth upholstery and three back and seat cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back and seat cushions, left-side chaise, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the chaise extension and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform backrest height and the sofa's clean, uninterrupted back profile.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the main seating area, right armrest, and the end of the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size and attached, with a sectional layout including a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile, padded armrests present on both ends, matching the seat height and featuring a simple, modern profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slim, cylindrical legs in a dark finish, positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support, exposed and slightly tapered for a minimalist look.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and subtle seam lines outlining the cushions; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
